sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Ship Movement
special_mechanics.description: Isometric-scrolling shooter gameplay. Player controls a ship navigating through stages in isometric perspective

special_mechanics.name: Bomb Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Three bomb types: fire wave bomb that scrolls behind player, circular nova blast, and homing mini-missile attacks

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Source is Wikipedia article which provides gameplay description but no quantitative physics parameters. Movement mechanics are ship-based rather than character-based platformer physics. Genesis port noted for severe slowdown and control degradation compared to Neo Geo original.
